summary: Added Nostr/NDK/marmot-ts/idb-keyval/nostr-tools dependencies. Implemented Tier 1 auto-identity: auto-generated keypair persisted to localStorage, NostrIdentityContext providing pubkey/npub/privateKeyHex, background kind-0 publish on startup, settings page identity chip with copy-npub button. All 53 unit tests pass. Build succeeds.
